title: carpinus omeiensis
intro: Carpinus omeiensis, also known as the Sichuan hornbeam, is a species of tree in the family Betulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Carpinus omeiensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and bronchitis, and protecting against cardiovascular and liver diseases. Herbal preparations of Carpinus omeiensis include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make tea, syrup, or capsule form for medicinal purposes.
